เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: หลังจากนั้นไม่นาน

Ah, it's indeed wrong, I'll change it back right away.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: อ่า จริงด้วย ผิดพลาดจริง ๆ ข้าจะแก้ไขเดี๋ยวนี้

Wait, who is in charge of this part?
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: เดี๋ยวก่อน ใครเป็นผู้รับผิดชอบในส่วนนี้?

This part... was in charge by Uncle La Tazhang before he went down the mountain.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ส่วนนี้... เมื่อก่อนลุงลาทาจางเป็นคนดูแล ก่อนที่เขาจะลงจากเขาไป

Uh... no wonder, it seems this was inevitable.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: อืม... ว่าแล้วเชียว นี่มันเป็นสิ่งที่หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้

This Taoist friend has an extraordinary temperament and is knowledgeable. I wonder where you are from and what is your Taoist name?
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: สหายนักพรตผู้นี้มีอุปนิสัยที่แปลกประหลาดและมีความรู้กว้างขวาง ข้าสงสัยว่าท่านมาจากที่ใดและมีนามทางเต๋าว่ากระไร?

I, Chang Chunzi, have seen the Taoist friends of {MyFaction}.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ข้า ฉางชุนจื่อ ได้พบกับสหายเต๋าแห่ง{MyFaction}แล้ว

I am just a wandering Taoist. I heard that your sect is going to hold a Luotian Dajiao, so I came to observe the ceremony.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ข้าเป็นเพียงนักพรตพเนจร ได้ยินว่าสำนักของท่านจะจัดพิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียว ข้าจึงมาขอร่วมสังเกตการณ์

Since you are so professional...
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ในเมื่อท่านมีความเชี่ยวชาญถึงเพียงนี้...

I would like to invite you to help me host the Luo Tian Grand Ceremony (1500Coin)
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ข้าขอเรียนเชิญท่านมาช่วยข้าเป็นประธานจัดพิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียว (1500 อีแปะ)

Thank you for your guidance. The Luotian Grand Ceremony is about to start, please feel free to do so.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ขอบคุณสำหรับคำชี้แนะ พิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียวจะเริ่มในอีกไม่ช้า เชิญท่านเข้าร่วมพิธีได้ตามอัธยาศัย

Thank you for giving me this opportunity. I also hope that our country can hold a grand Luotian Grand Ceremony to pray for the people.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ขอบคุณที่ให้โอกาสข้า ข้าก็หวังเช่นกันว่าแคว้นของเราจะสามารถจัดพิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียวอันยิ่งใหญ่ เพื่ออธิษฐานขอพรให้ราษฎร

I just walked around and found that some items for the Luotian Grand Ceremony are not yet ready and need to be purchased and prepared down the mountain.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ข้าเดินสำรวจดูรอบๆ แล้ว พบว่ามีสิ่งของบางอย่างสำหรับพิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียวที่ยังไม่พร้อม จำเป็นต้องจัดซื้อและเตรียมการจากข้างล่างเขา

Sure, since it's for the Luotian Grand Ceremony, the expenses for you to go down the mountain to handle affairs will be covered by our sect.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: แน่นอน ในเมื่อเป็นเรื่องของพิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียว ค่าใช้จ่ายในการลงเขาไปจัดการธุระของท่าน ทางสำนักของเราจะเป็นผู้ออกให้เอง

That's the best.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ถ้าเป็นเช่นนั้น ก็คงดีที่สุดแล้ว

Under the meticulous preparation and supervision of Chang Chunzi, the Luotian Grand Ceremony was very successful without any mistakes.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ภายใต้การเตรียมงานและการควบคุมดูแลอย่างพิถีพิถันของฉางชุนจื่อ พิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียวจึงประสบความสำเร็จเป็นอย่างมากโดยไม่มีข้อผิดพลาดใดๆ

After the Luotian Grand Ceremony, you sent an invite to Chang Chunzi to join the sect, and Chang Chunzi gladly agreed.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: หลังจากพิธีลู่เทียนต้าเจียว ท่านได้ส่งคำเชิญให้ฉางชุนจื่อเข้าร่วมสำนัก และฉางชุนจื่อก็ตอบรับด้วยความยินดี

Thank you, friend. I will find a place to watch the ceremony, no need to worry.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ขอบคุณสหาย ข้าจะหาที่ชมพิธีเอง ไม่ต้องกังวล

The Luo Tian Grand Ceremony was held as scheduled, but there were many mishaps during the process.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: พิธีลั่วเทียนต้าเจียวถูกจัดขึ้นตามกำหนด แต่กลับมีเหตุการณ์ไม่คาดฝันเกิดขึ้นมากมายระหว่างพิธี

Master, the Luo Tian Grand Ceremony has been held, but there were many mishaps.
I neglected this matter, but I guess it's not a big problem.
There is a village under your jurisdiction that has been hit by a plague. The situation is serious. Please send someone to quell the plague as soon as possible.
This is no small matter... I will arrange for someone to handle it.
Plague Disaster
A plague has broken out in a village, please send someone to calm it down as soon as possible.
You arrived at the place where the plague is rampant. The villagers are sick and bedridden, and the village is desolate.
I heard that the plague here makes people too weak to get out of bed, why are there still people going out?
You don't know, we have a "living god" with healing hands here. He started researching the plague as soon as he arrived and has already saved many people.
There's a "living immortal"? Take us to see him. I am a disciple of {MyFaction}, maybe I can help.
Look, the house in front is... Ah? Why is it all fenced up?
Chen Niwan, don't slander me!
I have already investigated clearly, the problem in this village is your doing!
Fellow villagers! I have worked hard for this village, lost my appetite, and put in a lot of effort, only to be slandered by such people. Fellow villagers, help me judge!
The villagers are talking about it, pointing at this Niwan Spiritual master.
We are disciples of {MyFaction}, what's going on here?
{MyFaction}? Perfect timing. I am Cui Xu Zi, a doctor who travels around. The people call me the Mud Pill Spiritual Master.
I heard about the plague here and rushed over day and night, only to unexpectedly find that this villain poisoned the water source, poisoning the whole village!

This person only appeared after the plague caused panic among the villagers, pretending to be a doctor and taking advantage of the villagers' remaining money and food. His intentions are evil and he deserves to be punished!
You're slandering me, what evidence do you have?
Let the disciples of {2} go with me to the water source to witness. If you are confident that you didn't do it, you can follow along!
What a joke, I... I'm not afraid, let's go!
Just a few steps after Niwan Spiritual master and you, this "living immortal" actually launched a sneak attack!
Hmph, if I hadn't been prepared, I might have fallen for it!
I, I just...
I was initially unsure of who was right or wrong between you two, but since you've made your move, it seems that what the Spiritual Master of Mud Pill said is true. Surrender, thief!
Spare me... spare me! I was blinded by greed!
How dare you, a thief, compare yourself to a "living immortal", poisoning the villagers, deceiving the world, and stealing names. Come with me to the sect!
Thank you, Spiritual Master, for revealing the true face of this thief. Otherwise, even we might have been deceived by him.
This is what we should do. I need to stay here and completely solve the plague.
After we take this villain away, we will come back to help the Spiritual Master quell the plague.
After taking the "living immortal" up the mountain, you quickly returned to the plague-stricken village to help the Mud Pill Spiritual Master treat the sick.

The Mud Pill Spiritual Master's medical skills are superb. After working tirelessly for nearly a month, the plague in the village was basically eradicated and the villagers' lives began to return to normal.
Mud Pill Spiritual Master, I have a request.
You want me to join your sect, don't you?
{MyFaction} is willing to work for the sick and poor without asking for anything in return. Punishing the evil and giving the people a peaceful life is what we should do.
Moreover, your sect has many pill recipes archived, joining your sect is also my wish.
Hmph, a bunch of ignorant youngsters, daring to ruin my good deeds!

Although he was defeated by this "living immortal", his true face was exposed and he could no longer deceive others. He had to use his lightness skills to take the money and run away from the village.
After the Mud Pill Spiritual Master healed your injuries, he threw himself into the busy work of treating the sick and saving people in the village.
Because they had been deceived once, the villagers were wary and suspicious of the Mud Pill Spiritual Master, which also caused some obstacles to the rescue work.
After you recovered, you began to help the Mud Pill Spiritual Master treat the sick and save people.
Mud Pill Spiritual Master, I have a request.
You want me to join your sect, don't you?
Um... yes.
People of {MyFaction} are willing to work for the sick and poor without asking for anything in return. Punishing the evil and giving the people a peaceful life is what we should do.
Besides, your sect has many pill recipes archived. Joining your sect is also my wish.
Master, the plague in the village has been eradicated. It is said that it was cured by a "living immortal" doctor.
I forgot about this... But I'm relieved that someone is handling it.
Leader, there's someone claiming to be an old acquaintance of yours asking to see you, with a special identity...
An old acquaintance? I wonder who it could be... I understand, I'll arrange it.
An old acquaintance is visiting
An old acquaintance is asking to see you, with a special identity... It's best for the leader to see him.
I was wondering who it was, turns out it's Zhan Xiongfei, the guard. What brings you here?
If you want to buy treasures, bid for it. Case interrogation, before this. Chat over tea, after this.
It seems Brother Shen still remembers the last incident.
You seem to have brought up something I don't want to remember.
I came here this time indeed with a request, I came to {MyFaction} to ask for a position.
Brother Zhan... Were you dismissed?
No, I'll be straightforward. I trust Brother Shen, so I'll state my purpose directly.

A major theft occurred in Daliang City, I was ordered to investigate, and everyone knows that all kinds of rare treasures often appear and circulate in {MyFaction}, so I want to stay here permanently to look for clues.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: เกิดการโจรกรรมครั้งใหญ่ในเมืองต้าเหลียง ข้าได้รับคำสั่งให้สืบสวน และทุกคนรู้ดีว่าสมบัติหายากทุกชนิดมักปรากฏและหมุนเวียนอยู่ใน {MyFaction} ข้าจึงต้องการอยู่ที่นี่เพื่อหาเบาะแส

Brother Shen, give me a position, so that I can act conveniently.
Of course, I won't cause trouble for Brother Shen. I came here prepared to change my identity and be driven by Brother Shen.
Until the clues are found?
Until the clues are found.
Why not go to Glittering Artifact Auction, or Dirty Street to have a look, aren't there auctions there too?
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ทำไมไม่ไปดูที่งานประมูลสินค้าหอไข่มุก หรือว่าที่ตรอกเล้าหมูนั่นก็จัดงานประมูลเหมือนกันไม่ใช่เหรอ?

We naturally have colleagues going there to investigate. It's just that I have an old relationship with Brother Shen, and my reputation... is really inconvenient.
Let me think for a moment...
Good, Brother Zhan, welcome to {MyFaction}.
{MyFaction} is too small to accommodate a hero like Brother Zhan.
Brother Zhan's strength is outstanding, which is helpful to {MyFaction}. But there are two points to make clear.
Brother Shen, please speak, I will follow.
First, don't make the investigation public. Second, don't interfere with the auction, even if the suspect is confirmed, take action after the auction is over, far away from {MyFaction}.
All these can be agreed upon.
Third, for the items I personally want to sell, I would like Brother Zhan to help raise the price secretly...
Well... it depends on the situation.
Forget it, forget it. But Brother Shen, I still have to make it clear.
I still need to continue investigating in {MyFaction}, but without the help of Brother Shen, I can't do anything conveniently.
Brother Shen, see you later.
Leader, your old acquaintance said he couldn't wait any longer and left first, he will come to visit again later.
The Soul Departure Syndrome is acting up again... sigh. I don't know who that old acquaintance is, I can only wait for him to visit again.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: อาการวิญญาณหลุดร่างของข้ากำเริบอีกแล้ว... เฮ้อ ข้าเองก็จำไม่ได้ว่าใครเป็นสหายเก่าคนนั้น คงต้องรอให้เขามาเยี่ยมเยือนข้าอีกครั้งแล้วล่ะ

What's wrong, why is the discipline of today's morning class so bad?
You're here! You come and manage this mad monk who ran back!
What's the panic, where's your cultivation?

This mad monk, hard to clean, ragged, emitting a foul smell. The novice monks who do morning classes have not reached the state of not being affected by the five senses, many people can't concentrate.

Moreover, he can't stand sitting meditation, doesn't like chanting, and starts sleeping on the spot less than half a moment into the morning class. What's worse, he even drinks and eats meat in public, disregarding the precepts.
Where is this person now?
Uh... he was just here, he must have run out of the temple on his own!
It seems I need to send some people out to find him.
Mad Monk Leaves the Temple
The new monk is really outrageous, please send someone to check it out.
You left {MyFaction}, because this mad monk is too conspicuous, there are many witnesses along the way.
You mean the monk with ragged clothes and patches, and a stinky smell? He ran in that direction!
That monk who drinks and eats meat, he just carried a crying girl this way!
Are you talking about that high monk? He helped a girl who was captured by Mountain Bandit find her parents, he's such a good person!
That monk uncle gave us a lot of big white steamed buns to eat... several people have been eating until they vomit and still eating.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ท่านลุงหลวงจีนท่านนั้นให้หมั่นโถวลูกใหญ่เรามามากมาย... หลายคนกินจนอ้วกออกมาแล้วก็ยังคงกินต่อไป

He woke up my mother! He's a living Buddha!
It seems that this mad monk has been doing good deeds all the way.
We've been chasing him all the way, and he's been running so fast, yet still has time to do good deeds. Isn't his Qinggong a bit outrageous...
Wait, look! There seems to be a strong man taking a shortcut ahead!
You bald donkey, you actually stole our mountain stronghold's food!
Stinky monk, that's what I worked hard to rob and steal from the mountain!
You actually gave it all to those lowly people, that's too much!
Monk, I see there are so many of you, you can't finish it all. You should leave some good karma by doing good deeds.
Stop!
I will not tolerate such evil deeds from you!
Haha, now you're chasing me, you'll reap what you sow!
The wind is too strong, let's go!
Where do you think you're going?
Master, master, we were wrong, please spare us!
I don't save evil people, but looking at your daily actions, you also have a bit of kindness. If you truly repent, start running south for three hundred miles from now on, don't stop for a moment!
Three hundred miles? Do we really have to run?
This...
Run, run, if you don't run now... hehehe haha.
Lai Toudian, are you really going to let them go?
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ไล่โถวเตียน นี่จะปล่อยพวกเขาไปจริงๆหรือ?

Are you a disciple of the Buddhist school? If so, we both do not kill. And their karma, hehe, is in the south, not here.
Forget it, let's run!
Three mountain bandits ran away in a puff of smoke.
Aren't you someone from our sect, why did you run over here?
We caught up with you, we want you to...
Go back to {MyFaction}.
You violated the precepts and were expelled from the sect.
We are here to take you back to {MyFaction}.
Hmm... I've seen a lot of karma in the world, and the harvest is quite rich, it's time to go back to {MyFaction}.
You've been indulging in wine and meat, haven't you...
Lai Toudian, you violated the precepts, the disciplinary monk will decide your punishment.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ไล่โถวเตียน เจ้าไม่ประพฤติตนอยู่ในศีล จะต้องถูกลงโทษตามพระธรรมวินัย

After returning to {MyFaction} with Lai Toudian
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: หลังจากกลับมาที่{MyFaction}กับไล่โถวเตียน

The mad monk is back? Good, good, let's see what punishment the disciplinary monks have for you.
Lai Toudian... violated the precepts... no punishment.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ไล่โถวเตียน... ทำผิดศีล... ไม่ถูกลงโทษ

Ah? Leader, this person has repeatedly violated the precepts, if not punished, other disciples will follow suit, how to convince the public?
Hehe, wine and meat pass through the intestines, but Buddha remains in the heart. If people learn from me, they will be like entering the demon way.
Lai Toudian has reached a state where he is not moved by external things.

For us ordinary monks, if we break the precepts of alcohol and meat, our cultivation will be shaken and we will gradually forget the meaning of Buddhism. When we see the suffering in the world, we will doubt the Buddha's intention and find it hard to calm our minds.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: พวกเราเป็นเพียงหลวงจีนธรรมดา หากทำลายศีลเรื่องสุราและเนื้อสัตว์ จิตใจจะเริ่มสั่นคลอน การบำเพ็ญเพียรจะเสื่อมถอยลง เมื่อเห็นความทุกข์ยากในโลกมนุษย์ อาจเกิดความสงสัยในหลักธรรมทางพุทธศาสนา ทำให้ยากที่จะควบคุมจิตใจที่ฟุ้งซ่านได้

But Lai Toudian has reached a state where external things do not move his heart, and he... is the reincarnation of the Dragon Slayer Arhat.
Wait, if you praise me, I like to hear it. But if you say I'm the reincarnation of some Arhat, I don't like to hear it.
The Buddhist door is wide open, can't it accommodate a mad monk? Lai Toudian is not bound by the precepts of wine and meat here.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ประตูพระธรรมนั้นเปิดกว้าง จะมีหลวงจีนเพี้ยนๆบ้างไม่ได้หรืออย่างไร? ไล่โถวเตียนไม่ถูกผูกพันด้วยข้อห้ามการดื่มสุราและกินเนื้อสัตว์

But your private exit from the mountain entrance, and affecting other monks' morning classes, indeed need to be punished, you are grounded and not allowed to go out.
Oh... this, when can I go out then?
When you can go out.
The old monk is playing tricks, and I'm not interested! If I can't go out, I'll find my own fun!
Lai Toudian, you have repeatedly violated the precepts, I am here to expel you, from now on you are no longer a member of {MyFaction}!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ไล่โถวเตียน เจ้าทำผิดศีลผิดวินัยซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า ข้ามาที่นี่เพื่อขับไล่เจ้าออกจาก{MyFaction}!

Hey, I thought you were here to help me take off my monk shoes.
As a monk, I still have a lot of karma to observe in the world, I'm leaving!
Lai Toudian left singing a song and shaking his broken Cattail fan.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ไล่โถวเตียนเดินจากไปพร้อมกับร้องเพลงและโบกพัดซ่อมซ่อในมือของเขา

These Mountain Bandits are quite skilled...
Get lost and don't let me see you again, if you steal my food again next time, I will break your hands and feet!
Huff, oh, my head hurts.
Huh? Huh? You are...
No, no, you've got the wrong person.
I'm not mistaken, you're the monk who saved me!
You're still a Mountain Bandit today, and you said you swore because I forced you, it doesn't sound good if this gets out, does it?
I... I... was forced by the world...
The world does bear some responsibility, but the main problem is you.
I... ask the master for guidance.
You three, run three hundred miles to the south, don't stop for a moment, go quickly!
Alright, master, we will go now.
What, big brother, do we really have to run?
Three hundred miles, I'll run out of breath before I can get away.

เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: อาา... พวกเจ้ามาขวางข้าอีกแล้วรึ

Eldest Brother, you should come back to {MyFaction} with us.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: พี่ใหญ่ ท่านควรกลับมายัง {MyFaction} พร้อมพวกเรา

You brought the dispirited Dugu Jianyi back to {MyFaction}
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: เจ้านำ ตู๋กูเจี้ยนอี้ผู้สิ้นหวังกลับมายัง {MyFaction}

Sword One, you have repeatedly left your post and went down the mountain on your own, how can you bear the responsibility of being the Eldest Brother with such behavior?
Now that all factions are crusading, it's a special time, I also want to go out and contribute to our sect.
Well, you've been doing righteous deeds every time you go down the mountain. The thank-you letters and commendation letters sent to the sect from the people below have piled up into a large stack.
From today on, you don't have to guard the Weapon Pavilion anymore, do what you want to do.
Really? Thank you, Sect Leader!
Turns out it's just a show-off, I thought it was some kind of expert, huh...
Don't be surprised, I'm actually a fake newcomer...
You should go back to the Sword Pavilion with us first...
You brought Dugu Jianyi, who is in a state of melancholy, back to the Sword Pavilion.

Jianyi, not only have you left your post and gone down the mountain on your own several times, but this time you also got your fellow disciples injured. You are punished to continue guarding the Weapon Pavilion until you are no longer restless!
Sigh... The Weapon Pavilion is so boring...
Sect Leader, Eldest Brother has returned with a dejected look.
Finally knows to come back? Let him guard the Weapon Pavilion well, if he runs away again, I will punish him severely!
Sect Leader, several disciples accidentally triggered the machinery while going down to the tomb and got trapped inside. Please rescue them quickly!
What a bunch of useless things... Let them wait a bit!
After the cock crows
Some disciples got accidentally trapped in the tomb, send some people to rescue them quickly!
What's the situation now? Have the people been rescued?
These guys touched the taboo while tomb raiding, and didn't come out after the rooster crowed, triggering the machinery and getting trapped...
They brought it upon themselves, if they can't get out, so be it. But if they can't bring out the treasures they found, that's a big problem!
Sigh! The most taboo thing in tomb raiding is greed.
You dug a hole and went down, and soon found the location of the trapped people in the tomb. They were separated from you by a stone door that opened from the inside.
Hey! Is there anyone inside?
Ah, it's our fellow disciples! You're here to save us!
What's the situation on your side?
We can't move at all now! There are two doors here, if one door opens, the other one will definitely open!
There are several extremely powerful Machinery Men behind the other door, they will rush in as soon as the door opens!
Besides, there's a fellow traveler trapped with us...
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ยิ่งไปกว่านั้น ยังมีสหายนักเดินทางอีกคนถูกกักขังอยู่ด้วยกันกับพวกเรา...

Fellow traveler? Who are you talking about?
It's me! Vagabond, known as Black Finger!
After I went down to the tomb, I saw these rookies messing around, thinking that according to the rules of the road, we wouldn't interfere with each other, each taking what we needed.
Damn it, these rookies triggered the Machinery Men, and I got locked up with them!
Wait a minute, when the door opens, I'll fight the Machinery Men with you!
Alright, we're all ready, let's work together!
Okay! Door~ open~
Wow... luckily my teeth weren't knocked out!
Your skills are not bad, which sect are you from?
Me? My sect was wiped out by the Crime Investigation Bureau a long time ago, it's not worth mentioning!
Your skills are wasted on solo fights, are you interested in joining us {MyFaction}?
You guys {MyFaction}? It's not unreasonable.
Alright, I'll join, I hope to exchange ideas with everyone and win a few big fights!
Wow, my teeth were knocked out...
Look at me!
Black Finger spat out a tooth, hitting the key joint of the Machinery Man, causing it to stop instantly.
Wow, this skill, it's not ordinary.
Your skills are not bad, which sect are you from?
Me? My sect was wiped out by the Crime Investigation Bureau a long time ago, it's not worth mentioning!
Your skills are wasted on solo fights, are you interested in joining us {MyFaction}?
You guys {MyFaction}? It's not unreasonable.
Alright, I'll join, but don't expect me to teach you rookies any skills, haha.
Sect Leader, the disciples who were trapped in the tomb have returned, but they are severely injured and need several months of rest.
This is their fate, destiny cannot be violated!
Why has the food improved so much recently? Hey, did someone new come to the kitchen recently?
Big leader, it's a butcher who calls himself the Imperial Chef. He offended someone he shouldn't have in Daliang City, so he came to be a bandit and cook for us.
It turns out to be the Imperial Chef... It seems I need to send someone to comfort him.
After the Imperial Chef
A butcher who claims to be a royal chef has come to the sect's kitchen, his cooking skills are extraordinary, arousing curiosity.
Are you the new cook? I'm here to... Whoa, what are you doing?
I'm butchering a cow.
You're butchering a cow, why is the scene so bloody...
Stay away from my knife, if it gets contaminated, the beef won't taste good.
That's terrifying... It feels like he wants to eat me...
Pao Chunqiu swings his kitchen knife, and where it goes, the beef falls apart. You notice that this hides a set of good knife skills.
This cook... Is he using martial arts to butcher?
Phew, it's done...
Brother, your knife skills are not bad, which Martial Arts family are you from?
What Martial Arts? This is my family's Imperial Chef knife technique.
I'll be straight with you, I think it's a waste for you to be butchering in the kitchen. How about joining our sect and doing something big?
From slaughtering animals to slaughtering people? It's not impossible, it's just that my knife is more than enough for slaughtering animals, but not so good for slaughtering people.
Should I forge a good knife for him?
Minerals are easy to come by, talents are hard to find! (1500 minerals)
Our sect isn't exactly wealthy...
No problem! Whatever kind of kitchen knife you want, I'll forge it for you!
Based on the size and shape of this knife, change the material to black iron.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ด้วยขนาดและรูปทรงของมีดเล่มนี้ ให้เปลี่ยนวัสดุเป็นเหล็กนิลด้วย

Black iron? Alright, I'll ask around...
After much effort, you've finally gathered enough materials to forge this rare black iron blade.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: หลังจากเสาะหาอย่างยากลำบากมานาน ในที่สุดข้าก็รวบรวมวัตถุดิบครบถ้วนเพื่อหลอมเหล็กนิลอันวิเศษนี้ขึ้นมา

Good blade, good blade! It has about half the essence of our ancestor's blade, I'll join you.
No problem, I'll continue my job as a cook. When you've finished the blade, I'll go and butcher people.
I suddenly remembered, I was supposed to visit a cook...
The butcher said he's working on an important recipe and doesn't want to see anyone. Please wait for a while.
Such a character? Alright, I'll wait for him!
Miss Ye has been disrupting the disciples' training since she returned. Should we do something about it?
When did she come back? Sigh, this girl, always so willful...
General's daughter
Miss Ye is disrupting the training again, send someone to persuade her!
Stop! I order you not to run!
Why are you disrupting the disciples' training again?
What disruption! I'm also training them!
They know who you are and give way to you, but you keep disrupting them, making it impossible for them to train daily.
Hmph!
How about this, I'll take you to a guerrilla general who is proficient in training. You fight him, and I'll assist you.
If you win, from now on, I'll treat you as a real member of the Ye Family Battalion, and you'll join them in training and fighting!
Good!
Phew... finally won.
I'm clearly the main force, why are you so tired...
You better keep your word!
Alright, from today on, you are a true member of the Ye Family Battalion. But be prepared, no one will give way to you on the real battlefield!
Hmph! I've never been afraid!
Damn it!
What, can't win when someone doesn't let you off?
Go back and practice more! Don't always be so willful.
Miss Ye has gone out to wander the martial world, I don't know when she will be back.
Let her run, let's see if she comes back unhappy this time!
A blind soldier with a gun has come to join us, he specifically asked to see you.
A blind soldier? Sounds like a real man. I'll arrange for someone to receive him.
After the Yang Family
A blind soldier with a gun came to join, he specifically asked to see you.
The sound of marching... the slogan of training... the smell of iron and blood... it's here.
Who are you and why are you looking for me?
That voice, are you Uncle Pengju?
You are...
Zai Xing?
Zai Xing! It's really you! Quick, bring a seat!
Uncle Pengju, it's so good to hear your voice!
Zai Xing, what happened to your eyes...
It's a long story...

Don't worry, Zai Xing, now that you're here, I'll make sure everything is arranged for you.
I came to the Ye Family Battalion, not to be a useless person who needs to be served!
Let me join the Ye Family Battalion, let me go to the battlefield again!
But, a warrior without eyes...
My hearing has been trained to be as good as my eyes, I can hear what my eyes can't see!
If you don't believe me, feel free to send someone to spar with me!
Hmm... alright, I'll pick someone from the camp to compete with you!
Damn, just a little bit...
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ให้ตายเถอะ อีกนิดเดียว...

Good, worthy of a military family! I noticed in the spar just now that your sensitivity to weapons even surpasses that of soldiers with eyesight.
General Yang's adopted son is indeed a prodigy!
So I...
You are fully capable of fighting on the battlefield! Someone, enlist Mu Zaixing in the army!
Thank you!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ขอบคุณ!

Uncle Pengju, you flatter me.
You are fully capable of fighting on the battlefield! Someone, enlist Mu Zaixing in the army!
Thank you!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ขอบคุณ!

Fight fire with fire
There's a wounded boy lying outside the door, please arrange for someone to go and see.
Hey, kid, wake up!
Uh...

Zi Tian has offended many strong people, it seems his martial arts are indeed good, maybe he can be used by our sect?
Drive them all away

Damn it, you wait!
Welcome to come anytime!

Words cannot express my gratitude!
I am willing to join such a righteous sect, let me join {MyFaction}!

Don't block the door, let me in!
Damn... it's a disgrace to {MyFaction}.

Actually, we don't have any deep hatred with this kid, it's just that his character is too impulsive, always likes to speak with his fists.
This money should be able to give an explanation to the people he beat up, I hope he can behave himself.
Young man, don't worry, the people who were bothering you have been dealt with.
Words cannot express my gratitude!
I am willing to join such a righteous sect, let me join {MyFaction}!
Good, we are also in need of young heroes like you! Welcome to join!

One-eyed Swordsman

I know which treasure map you're talking about, name your price.

So proactive, there must be something fishy.

Stop dawdling, time waits for no one, quickly send people to find the treasure with me.
Great! Let's set off on horseback!

Share the treasure for no reason, sorry, I don't trust you.
Those who follow different paths cannot make plans together!

Reporting to the leader, the one-eyed man who wanted to trade suddenly ran away.
I'm afraid I've neglected him, but after all, one person can't treasure hunt, he should come back.

Promote deputy

Report...

Sun Dongwang got a fake manual last night and practiced until he was obsessed, he can't make it to the venue!

Get this shameless man out of here!
A hero cherishes a hero, hahaha!
I will do my best to live up to the trust of the sect leader!

Gu Qing Yang, with undisguised disappointment, ran away {MyFaction}.
Sect leader, there were some problems at the venue, everyone was arguing and fighting, it seems we can only choose again next year...

Withdraw your palm quickly! Otherwise, we'll both die here!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: รีบถอนฝ่ามือเถอะ! ไม่งั้นเราทั้งคู่จะตายอยู่ที่นี่กันหมด!

Without external help, this situation is a dead end... Alas, I didn't expect that we would die here after fighting for a lifetime.

Phew... I finally made it... These two masters haven't decided the winner yet, it's time for me to show up!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ฟู่... ในที่สุดก็มาถึงจนได้… สองยอดฝีมือยังไม่สามารถตัดสินแพ้ชนะ นี่คงเป็นโอกาสให้ข้าได้แสดงตัว!

The two heroes are extraordinary, I, {MyFaction}, pay my respects.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: สองท่านผู้กล้ายอดฝีมือ ข้ามาจากสำนัก{MyFaction} ขอน้อมคารวะพวกท่าน

Why are you ignoring me? Although my sect is not famous and weak, it shouldn't be forcibly ignored... Right, they must be too focused on their duel, let me try again louder!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ทำไมถึงเขาถึงเมินข้าล่ะ? สำนักข้าแม้จะชื่อเสียงไม่มาก แต่ก็ไม่น่าจะโดนเมินถึงขนาดนี้... ใช่แล้ว! พวกเขาคงกำลังจดจ่อกับการต่อสู้มากเกินไป ข้าควรจะตะโกนให้ดังกว่านี้!

The two heroes are extraordinary, I, {MyFaction}, pay my respects!!!
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: ท่านผู้กล้ายอดฝีมือทั้งสอง ข้ามาจากสำนัก{MyFaction} ขอน้อมคารวะพวกท่าน!!!

Puff...
Uh...

The two masters were originally forced into a life-and-death internal force competition due to the mutual generation and restraint of their internal forces. \nUnexpectedly, your sudden loud shock \naccidentally broke this endless deadlock.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: สองยอดฝีมือเดิมทีถูกบีบให้สู้กันจนกว่าจะมีฝ่ายหนึ่งสิ้นชีวิต เพราะพลังภายในที่ขัดแย้งกัน\nแต่เสียงตะโกนที่ไม่คาดคิดของเจ้า \nกลับทำให้สถานการณ์อันร้ายแรงนี้ถูกขัดจังหวะอย่างไม่ตั้งใจ

I didn't expect to be saved like this... Steady, steady, pay attention to the expression, there are juniors here, can't lose face.

The two each took out an item from their bosoms and threw it on the ground, then ran away quickly one after the other. \nYou vaguely noticed that there seemed to be a touch of embarrassment on their faces.

Master, there is a beauty waiting outside the door, she wants to gamble with you by name.
At this time, someone comes to gamble, are you sure she is a beauty, not some drunk gambler who lost his way?
Of course I'm sure, this lady is bold and elegant, especially the tattoo on her right arm, it's simply captivating...
Something unusual must be wrong, send someone to meet her.
Master, Yi Zhihua came to find you with her horse cart again, there are a lot more boxes on the cart than before, it seems that a lot of people who want to prove their luck have lost to her...
This Sister Hua is really an interesting person, go out and meet her.
Addicted to gambling
A bold and gorgeous tattooed beauty comes to your sect, she wants to gamble with you by name.
You come to the mountain entrance of your sect,\nfound that the beauty is leaning on a horse cart full of various boxes,\nboredly playing with the dice in her hand.
You made me wait for so long, you have to play with me for a few rounds!
It's really an unexpected guest...
Unexpectedly, the head of the Xuan Yi Society didn't stay in Da Liang to run the Zhangyue Casino, but came to me {MyFaction} to gamble.

Don't mention it, isn't it because you martial arts sects are fighting and killing everywhere, causing people to be terrified and not leave their homes. There's not even a ghost in Zhangyue Casino now, otherwise why would I need to travel and look for people to gamble with me to relieve my boredom?
Since you're looking for someone to relieve your boredom, Sister Hua, why are you carrying so many boxes in your horse cart? It's not safe.
You mean those things? Hey, they're all sorts of things I've won from unlucky people along the way. I've put these treasures into various boxes and invented a new kind of fun gambling game.
How about it, will you play a game with me?
Sister Hua, you've always been credible, you shouldn't cheat me. Alright, I'll play with you.

My game is simple, you spend a certain amount of resources to get any box from my horse cart. The things in the box are varied, good and bad, but once you buy it, you can't return it. You have to accept the result of the gamble.
Interesting, which box should I choose...
Sturdy black iron box<color=#c44b0e>(2000 Coins)</color>
Dusty leather box<color=#c44b0e>(2000 Food)</color>
Uniquely shaped rattan box<color=#c44b0e>(2000 Herbs)</color>
Clean and simple wooden box<color=#c44b0e>(2000 Wood)</color>
Gorgeous and grand copper box<color=#c44b0e>(2000 Minerals)</color>
Gambling is a sinful abyss, I'd better not choose...
You come to the outside of the sect's Mountain Entrance and find Yi Zhihua leaning on the wheel of the horse cart as before, playing with the dice in her hand in boredom.
It seems that Sister Hua has been quite lucky with her gambling recently. The boxes on the cart have not decreased, but have increased.
เพิ่มการโจมตีและการป้องกันอย่างมาก: อย่างที่เห็นได้ว่าช่วงนี้พี่สาวฮวาโชคดีเรื่องเกมพนันมาก กล่องในรถไม่ได้น้อยลงเลย แถมยังมีเพิ่มขึ้นด้วย

Those fools not only have no discernment, can't find the boxes with good things, but also have bad luck. Winning their things is simply boring.
It's more fun to play with smart people like you. Tell me, which one are you going to choose this time?
Which box should I choose...
I want this box, there must be good things inside!
Let me see, inside is... this is not reasonable! How could you choose such a good thing!
Sister Hua, you said it yourself, once bought, no returns, you have to accept the result of the gamble~
Humph, come again if you dare, I don't believe you can be so lucky!
I want this box, there must be good things inside!
Oh, you have a good eye, choosing this box, you must have made a profit.
Come and play a few more games with me, this time must have been a fluke.
I want this box, there must be good things inside!
Congratulations, you have chosen the extremely rare... rarely seen in the world...
Consolation prize!
But I suggest you don't be discouraged, you might turn your luck around in the next game.
Gambling is a sinful abyss, I'd better not choose...
This is what you said! I'm leaving now, and you'll miss a good opportunity to make a fortune, hmph!
Yi Zhihua glared at you, then calmly got on the horse cart and disappeared from your sight in a short while.
I always feel like I'm missing something... Is it just my imagination?
Let's continue...
